explanation: The provided code defines a Pascal program that converts decimal numbers from 1 to a specified maximum (N) into hexadecimal format. It includes functions to handle the conversion and to check if the digits of the original decimal number can be rearranged to match the digits of the resulting hexadecimal number. The program prints both the decimal number and its hexadecimal equivalent if they share the same digits, alongside detailed calculations of each step in the conversion process.
name: 2007-03-12_unnamed
subject: Decimal to Hex Program - Fixed
summary: This project converts decimal numbers to their hexadecimal representation and verifies if the decimal and hexadecimal values share the same digits in any order.
